mentions_legales.label: Dénomination sociale (nom/raison sociale)
mentions_legales.quote: Kahoot! is a global educational technology and software-as-a-service group providing a learning platform for the global educational technology market.

mentions_legales.label: Adresse de l'établissement / siège social
mentions_legales.quote: Kahoot! AS, organization number 997 770 234, located at Kronprinsesse Märthas plass 1, 0160 Oslo, Norway

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Identité du Responsable de Traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Controller entity | Contact details |
|---|---|
| Kahoot! AS | [privacy@kahoot.com] |

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Types de données collectées + raison
Base légale du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
| Purpose of processing | Legal basis for processing |
|---|---|
| __Provision of the Services:__providing our Services, App and Websites (e.g., arranging access to an account, responding to inquiries and allowing utilization of various Service features).__Enabling use of certain features:__automatically processing Personal Information in order to enable you to use certain features of our Services (e.g., publishing a kahoot, making a comment, joining a group etc.).
 | The processing is necessary in connection with any contract that you have entered into with us, or to take steps prior to entering into a contract with us;We have a legitimate interest in carrying out the processing for the purpose of providing our Services, Websites or App (to the extent that such legitimate interest is not overridden by your interests, fundamental rights, or freedoms); orThe processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Caractère obligatoire/facultatif + conséquences
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: the right not to provide your Personal Information to us (however, please note that we will be unable to provide you with the full benefit of our Websites, the App or the Service, if you do not provide us with your Personal Information — e.g., we might not be able to process your requests without the necessary details);

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Durée de conservation des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We do not retain Personal Information longer than necessary for the purposes for which Personal Information was collected. We retain Personal Information where we have an ongoing legitimate business or legal obligation to do so.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Destinataires des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
We do not share Personal Information with third-parties except in the limited circumstances outlined below.

- you and, where appropriate, your appointed representatives.
- Affiliates. We may share and disclose your Personal Information with the companies in the Kahoot! Group, for our legitimate business purposes or to provide services that may include one or more of our Group Companies.
- Service providers. We may share Personal Information with our trusted service providers who perform services on our behalf (e.g. web hosting, technical support, processing of payment, analytics services and content provision), but strictly for the purpose of carrying out work on our behalf as described in this Privacy Notice.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Prise de décision automatisée
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Our recruitment partners in their capacity as controllers may use technology to select appropriate applicants for us to consider based on criteria expressly identified by us, or typical in relation to the role for which you have applied. The process of finding suitable applicants is automatic, however, any decision as to who we will engage to fill the job opening will be made by our staff.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Sécurité des données (art. 32 RGPD)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: Kahoot! maintains a comprehensive security program designed to protect the security, privacy, confidentiality and integrity of Personal Information within our organization. We have in place appropriate and reasonable technical and organizational measures designed to protect Personal Information from loss, misuse, unauthorized access, disclosure, alteration, and destruction, taking into account the risks involved in the processing and the nature of the Personal Information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : catégories concernées
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may collect or validate business contact information about prospective and existing business customers from publicly available data and third-party data providers. We use this information to maintain accurate records and, where permitted by applicable law, to contact you about our Services, based on our legitimate interest in providing our Services to businesses;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Collecte indirecte : source des données
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: We may collect or validate business contact information about prospective and existing business customers from publicly available data and third-party data providers.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'introduire une plainte (CNIL)
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: the right to lodge a complaint with your applicable data protection authority regarding our collection and use of your Personal Information. Please contact your local data protection authority for more information.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit de rectification
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: the right to request rectification of any inaccuracies in your Personal Information;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'accès
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: the right to request access to, or copies of, your Personal Information, together with information regarding the nature, processing and disclosure of those Personal Information;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à l'effacement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
the right to request, on legitimate grounds:
- erasure of your Personal Information; or

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la limitation du traitement
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
the right to request, on legitimate grounds:
- restriction of processing of your Personal Information;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit à la portabilité
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote: the right to have certain Personal Information transferred to another Controller, in a structured, commonly used and machine-readable format, to the extent applicable;

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Droit d'opposition
politique_donnees_personnelles.quote:
the right to object, on grounds relating to your particular situation, to the processing of your Personal Information by us or on our behalf, where such processing is based on Articles 6(1)(e) (public interest) or 6(1)(f) (legitimate interests) of the GDPR / UK GDPR (as applicable); and
- the right to object to the processing of your Personal Information by us or on our behalf for direct marketing purposes.

politique_donnees_personnelles.label: Date de dernière mise à jour de la politique

cookies.label: Présence d'une politique cookies
cookies.quote: Cookie data: Cookies which allow us to collect information such as browser type and other anonymous traffic data. Please see our Cookie Notice for more information on our use of Cookies.

cookies.label: Retrait du consentement simple et à tout moment
Information sur le Responsable de Traitement
cookies.quote:
| Controller entity | Contact details |
|---|---|
| Kahoot! AS | [privacy@kahoot.com] |

cookies.label: Finalité des cookies (claire et complète)
cookies.quote: We use session storage to collect basic website statistics including visitor counts, page navigation, and error monitoring. This involves temporarily storing a random identifier in your browser that expires when you close the tab or after 24 hours. This data helps us understand total website usage and ensure our website functions properly.

cookies.label: Durée de conservation des cookies
cookies.quote: We use session storage to collect basic website statistics including visitor counts, page navigation, and error monitoring. This involves temporarily storing a random identifier in your browser that expires when you close the tab or after 24 hours.

cookies.label: Détail des types de cookies déposés
Outil de mesure d'audience mentionné
cookies.quote: We use session storage to collect basic website statistics including visitor counts, page navigation, and error monitoring.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Existence de transferts hors UE + destinataires
transferts_hors_ue.quote: We collect information globally and may transfer, process and store your information outside of your country of residence, to wherever we or our third-party service providers operate for the purposes identified in Section 3.1 above.

transferts_hors_ue.label: Stockage cloud hors UE + localisation serveurs

identite.quote: - **Personal details**. Such as your given name(s); and preferred name;
identite.purpose: Identification et personnalisation du compte utilisateur.

contact.quote: - **Contact details**. E-mail address, mailing address, telephone number and job title (for example for contact persons for businesses or educational institutions);

compte_auth.quote: - **Data relating to our Websites and App, and your account.**Such as:- Account log-in credentials such as your email address or username and password when you sign up for an account with us;
compte_auth.purpose: Gestion de l'authentification et de la sécurité des comptes.

paiement.quote: - **Payment details**. Billing address and the last four digits and expiration of a stored credit card, or other payment information and financial information that we/our payment processors need in order to provide the Services;

localisation.quote: - **Geolocation data**at a city-level only, derived from your IP address
localisation.purpose: Localisation approximative pour personnalisation et analyse.

appareil_technique.quote: - **Technical data**:- Browser or device information which is collected through your device, such as Media Access Control (MAC) address, screen resolution, operating system name and version, device manufacturer and model, language, internet browser type and version of the Services (such as the App) you are using;- **Cookie data**: Cookies which allow us to collect information such as browser type and other anonymous traffic data.
appareil_technique.purpose: Analyse technique et amélioration des services.

usage_comportement.quote: - **Usage data** which is collected whenever you interact with our Service. This may include the dates and times you access the Services and your browsing activities (such as what portions of the Service you used).
usage_comportement.purpose: Analyse de l'utilisation des services et personnalisation.

contenus_utilisateur.quote: - **Content information**. If you interact with any third-party content on a Website or in the App (including third-party plugins and Cookies) we receive Personal Information from the relevant third-party provider of that content;- **Views and opinions**. Any views and opinions that you choose to send to us, or publicly post about us on social media platforms;
contenus_utilisateur.purpose: Gestion des contenus créés ou partagés par l'utilisateur.

communications.quote: - **Communication data**. Several of our Services let you share information with other people, and you have the control over what you share and with whom you share. For example, when signed in and interacting with certain Kahoot! Services, such as leaving comments on the Websites, you may disclose Personal Information to us and the general public.
communications.purpose: Gestion des communications entre utilisateurs et avec Kahoot!.

donnees_tiers.quote: - We may collect or validate business contact information about prospective and existing business customers from publicly available data and third-party data providers;- We may collect Personal Information about you from other sources, such as our Partners, integrations or other third-parties, for example where you have given permission to the third-party to share your information with us;
donnees_tiers.purpose: Enrichissement des données utilisateur via des sources tierces.

donnees_sensibles.quote: - **Sensitive Personal Information**Kahoot! account credentials Personal Information collected from a known child.
donnees_sensibles.purpose: Gestion des données sensibles liées aux comptes enfants.

mineurs.quote: - **Children players**. Kahoot! collects only a nickname, which is not linked to any other Personal Information, including any persistent identifier, from a Child who merely plays a Kahoot! game;- When a Child creates an account, we collect his or her email address only for the purpose of providing password reminders to him or her, but we do not collect any other Personal Information.
mineurs.purpose: Gestion des données des mineurs pour les services éducatifs.

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, compte_auth, paiement, appareil_technique, usage_comportement
legal_bases.quote: | __Provision of the Services:__providing our Services, App and Websites (e.g., arranging access to an account, responding to inquiries and allowing utilization of various Service features).__Enabling use of certain features:__automatically processing Personal Information in order to enable you to use certain features of our Services (e.g., publishing a kahoot, making a comment, joining a group etc.). | The processing is necessary in connection with any contract that you have entered into with us, or to take steps prior to entering into a contract with us;

legal_bases.data: identite, contact, appareil_technique, usage_comportement, localisation, contenus_utilisateur, communications
legal_bases.quote: | __Improving or personalizing our Service:__using your Personal Information to provide, improve and support the use of the Services and certain features (including sharing your information with third-parties); perform data analytics, including combining your usage data across sessions, devices, and browsers to understand how our Services are used over time (subject to your cookie consent); | We have a legitimate interest in carrying out the processing for the purpose of improving our Service, Websites or App (to the extent that such legitimate interest is not overridden by your interests, fundamental rights, or freedoms).

| __Direct marketing:__sending you marketing communications by email about the Kahoot! platform and Kahoot! affiliates, including promotions, new features, and relevant content; | Our primary legal basis for sending you marketing communications is your consent. Where you have opted in to receive marketing communications, you may withdraw your consent at any time without affecting the lawfulness of processing carried out before withdrawal.

| __Legal compliance:__compliance with our legal and regulatory obligations under applicable law (including comply with requests by public authorities, court orders, valid subpoenas or other appropriate legal mechanisms). | The processing is necessary for compliance with a legal obligation, where applicable;

transfers.quote: - We collect information globally and may transfer, process and store your information outside of your country of residence, to wherever we or our third-party service providers operate for the purposes identified in Section 3.1 above.
